title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 174.140 - Employees — terms, compensation, retirement, workers' compensation for
text:
174.140.  Employees — terms, compensation, retirement, workers' compensation for. — Each board of regents may appoint and remove the president or any professor or teacher in any state college in its district; may fix the duration, terms and conditions of their offices and compensation; may enter into agreements for and make contributions to both voluntary and statutory retirement plans for the president, professors and teachers; and under rules adopted by the board may extend the provisions of the workers' compensation law to all employees thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 10765, A.L. 1947 V. II p. 382, A.L. 1969 p. 288) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9608; 1919 § 11503; 1909 § 11074
